title: filago carpetana subsp. maroccana
intro: Filago carpetana subsp. maroccana, also known as the Moroccan cotton-grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its small white flowers and cotton-like seeds. The medicinal properties of Filago carpetana subsp. maroccana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Filago carpetana subsp. maroccana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
